driver_action: Execute `clang` (or `metalfe`) frontend in Metal language mode; run Lexer/Sema/CodeGen and emit LLVM bitcode (.air).
apple_behavior_observed: Emits pure LLVM bitcode container (`.air`) containing `!air.version`, `!air.kernel` metadata, and `@air.*` intrinsics
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Clean-room `clang fork` emits exact `.air` bitcode with identical metadata schema

driver_action: Execute Metal Linker / Container Writer (`metal-linker` / `airconv` / `write_metallib.py`); wrap `.air` bitcode into `.metallib` container (`MTLB` or `0xcbfebabe` Fat64).
apple_behavior_observed: Creates 88B slice header, Directory Header (`headers_len`), Tag records (`NAME`, `TYPE`, `HASH`, `OFFT`, `VERS`, `MDSZ`), `HDYN` block, wrapped bitcode, and `AIRR` reflection
cleanroom_implementation_notes: 100% byte-exact container structure verified via `analyze_metallib.py` and real `makeLibrary(data:)` load tests

driver_action: Inject build timestamp and SDK cryptographic signatures / symlinks into `.metallib` container.
apple_behavior_observed: Updates `HDYN` / `UUID` block inside slice header with exact build fingerprint
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Clean-room `write_metallib.py` populates `UUID` block (`os.urandom(16)` or fixed fingerprint)

driver_action: Driver passes `-fmetal-bounds-checks` to `cc1`; CodeGen injects `__air_ra_check_buffer_read/write` hooks before pointer indexing.
apple_behavior_observed: Every array subscript `a[id]` emits `tail call ptr @__air_ra_check_buffer_read(ptr %a, ulong %id, ulong 4)`

driver_action: Driver configures `LangOptions::FastMath` and instructs CodeGen to set `!air.compile_options = !{!11, !12, !13}` (`fast_math_enable`).
apple_behavior_observed: Replaces precise `sin/cos/exp` candidates with fast table-lookup variants and flushes denorms to zero

driver_action: Driver locates Xcode SDK directory (`/Applications/Xcode.app/...` or `/private/var/run/...`) and sets system include paths (`-isystem .../include/metal`).
cleanroom_implementation_notes: Clean-room driver automatically maps `-sdk macosx` + `-std=metal3.1` to target triple `air64_v26-apple-macosx14.0.0` (`legacy_metal_support_map.csv`)
